comments.text:
👇 Everything we curated for this Easter Island episode. Books, history, Pacific stories, travel resources.

*📚 BROWSE THE EASTER ISLAND COLLECTION*
  ◦ Every book, documentary, and cultural item we'd recommend for this episode → https://amzn.to/4dAWYyf

*🛍 SEE OUR FULL W.O.E. STOREFRONT*
  ◦ Every destination Collection in one place → https://www.amazon.com/shop/whereonearth

*🎟 TOURS AND EXPERIENCES ON EASTER ISLAND*
  ◦ Moai sites, Rapa Nui National Park tours, sunrise at Tongariki → https://shorturl.at/Ks9zG
  ◦ Browse all Easter Island experiences → https://shorturl.at/JZ4lW

*📖 PLAN YOUR EASTER ISLAND TRIP*
  ◦ A Companion to Easter Island by James Grant-Peterkin → https://amzn.to/4x0uohE
  ◦ Lonely Planet Chile and Rapa Nui, current edition → https://amzn.to/4tX5wod

*📚 GO DEEPER INTO EASTER ISLAND*
  ◦ Island at the Edge of the World by Mike Pitts, NYT 2024 best book → https://amzn.to/3RPkUFA
  ◦ The Statues That Walked by Terry Hunt and Carl Lipo → https://amzn.to/3RuUN6V

*🌊 PACIFIC STORIES WORTH BRINGING HOME*
  ◦ Sea People by Christina Thompson → https://amzn.to/4wW1xL5
  ◦ The Wide Wide Sea by Hampton Sides → https://amzn.to/430A39C

comments.author: @sau-p9v
comments.text: 17.21 .... New Zealand ... Fantastic attempt to match narrating and visuals; there were very few exceptions. Quite enjoy watching your other works as well. Matching visuals with narrating attracts my type of audience. Easter Islanders by the way,  I believe are polynesian or melanesian  looking however the accompanying visuals showed people with much more fair skins. Even today I still couldn't work out how such people, without iron tools, managed to carve into huge, rock solid, volcanic rocks n turned them into statues that look like men. The bible talks about the making of statues of men as forbidden because since men look like God, making a statue of man is the same as making a statue of God himself: and that is not allowed according to the old Testament .. now  I'm  wondering if  the unique mystery of the Easter Island statues and history. has anything to do with that?
